Package org.areslib.pathplanner.dummy

Class Commands

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.pathplanner.dummy.Commands
public class Commands extends Object
A dummy implementation of the WPILib Commands factory. This class translates WPILib-style command requests internally into ARESLib's compatible custom command framework to allow PathPlanner configuration mapping without android/WPILib runtime.

    Creates a command that builds the inner command dynamically at runtime rather than at definition time.

    Executes one command or another depending on a condition evaluated at initialization time.

    Returns a command that does absolutely nothing right away.

    Returns a command that simply prints the provided string to standard output.

    Creates a command that executes the provided runnable periodically and never finishes until interrupted.
    static Command
    runOnce(Runnable r)
    Creates a command that runs the given runnable once and finishes immediately.
    static Command
    sequence(Command... cmds)
    Creates a SequentialCommandGroup from the provided commands.
    static Command
    waitSeconds(double s)
    A basic delay command utilizing System.currentTimeMillis() for headless runtime compatibility.

      public Commands()

  • Method Details

    • sequence

      public static Command sequence(Command... cmds)
      Creates a SequentialCommandGroup from the provided commands.
      Parameters:
      cmds - array of commands to execute sequentially
      Returns:
      the generated SequentialCommandGroup

    • either

      public static Command either(Command onTrue, Command onFalse, BooleanSupplier sel)
      Executes one command or another depending on a condition evaluated at initialization time.
      Parameters:
      onTrue - the command to execute if condition is true
      onFalse - the command to execute if condition is false
      sel - the boolean condition supplier
      Returns:
      an InstantCommand that runs the chosen command's initialization

    • runOnce

      public static Command runOnce(Runnable r)
      Creates a command that runs the given runnable once and finishes immediately.
      Parameters:
      r - the runnable to execute
      Returns:
      the InstantCommand wrapping the runnable

    • waitSeconds

      public static Command waitSeconds(double s)
      A basic delay command utilizing System.currentTimeMillis() for headless runtime compatibility.
      Parameters:
      s - the number of seconds to wait
      Returns:
      the delay Command

    • none

      public static Command none()
      Returns a command that does absolutely nothing right away.
      Returns:
      an empty InstantCommand

    • print

      public static Command print(String s)
      Returns a command that simply prints the provided string to standard output.
      Parameters:
      s - string to print
      Returns:
      the printing InstantCommand

    • run

      public static Command run(Runnable r)
      Creates a command that executes the provided runnable periodically and never finishes until interrupted.
      Parameters:
      r - the runnable to execute every cycle
      Returns:
      the generated continuous Command

    • defer

      public static Command defer(Supplier<Command> s)
      Creates a command that builds the inner command dynamically at runtime rather than at definition time.
      Parameters:
      s - the command supplier
      Returns:
      the deferred command wrapper

    • deadline

      public static Command deadline(Command deadline, Command... cmds)
      Creates a ParallelDeadlineGroup running until the deadline command finishes.
      Parameters:
      deadline - the command whose completion causes the group to end
      cmds - the other commands to run in parallel
      Returns:
      the ParallelDeadlineGroup
